name: Midline Messaging Workshop Prep Guide
description: Pre-workshop preparation guide distributed to Maxtor executives and core team before the February 13 2004 midline category creation workshop in Shrewsbury MA. Provides session goals and pre-read questions for three workshop sessions covering category definition, go-to-market strategy, and messaging finalization. Includes appendices defining Pools of Storage concepts and messaging foundations.

creator.name: Peter Kastner, David Hill, John Boyne
